label: Approve draft only
effect: Changes browser-local state and appends a local audit row only.

label: Keep owner review
effect: Marks the task as requiring owner review.

label: Reject recommendation
effect: Rejects the proposed action in demo state only.

label: Needs bench check
effect: Marks warranty work as waiting for physical verification in local demo state only.

label: Approve draft only
effect: Payment/warranty draft approval only; no live connector, payment processor, shipping, vendor, or customer action fires.
